{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee tai Semmê/ fur
tee Zeetumâ irr westi to atkak pee
Sirđs neims/ un atgreesifees un
tew peefanks fawa Zeetuma
Semmê/ jazźidami: Mehs eftim
grehkojschi un aplan darrijscht/
mehs eftim besdeewigi bijufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee pee tewis at-
greeschahs no wiffas tawas
Sirđs/ un no wiffas fawas
Dwehfeles tai Semmê fawa
Zeetuma/ fur tee Zeetumâ tohp
turreti/ un tee tew peeluhgs tai
Zelta prett fawu Semmi/ fo tu
winnu Tehweein dewis prett to
Pilsfahtu/ fo tu eft iswehlejs /
un prett to Nammu/ fo es ta-
wain Wahrdam efinu ustaiftjs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad klausi tu no Debbe-
fim/ no tahs Weetas/ fur tu
dshwo winnu Luhgſchanu/ un
winnu Sirđs Saukſchanu/ un
nefs teem to Teefu/ un peedohd
tawecin Laudim/kas prett tew irr
grehkojuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu mans Deews/ laid
jelle tawas Azzis irr atwehru/ un
tawasAusis usklaufs us to Luhg-
schanu schinni Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu zellsees/ KUNGS
Deews/pee tawasDuſteſchanas/
tu un tas Schkirsts tawa Speh-
ka/ lat tawi Preestert KUNGS
Deews ar Pestifschann apgehrb-
ti tohp/ un tawi Swehtee pahr to
Labbumu preezajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak KUNGS Deews!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta Deewa Gshdiba peepilda to Deewa
Namimu : 2. Tas Kehniisch un wiſſi Isra-
els uppure : 4. Tas KUNGS parahdahs
Salamanam : 12. Un fakka winnam/ ka tas
eſu winna Luhgſchannu paklausifs : 13. Ar
Apfohlſchannu ta Labbuma : 17. Un Beedi-
nasehanu ta Kaunuma : 19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad nu Salamans btj
pabetdsis luhtt/ tad krit-
te Ugguns no Debbe-
fim/ un norhje tohs Dedsamo-
Uppneus un zittus Uppneus/ un
ta KUNGA Gohdiba peepildtja
to Namimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Preestert ne warre-
ja ta KUNGA Namma eet/ jo
ta KUNGA Gohdiba btj ta
KUNGANamimu peepildtifs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiſſi Israëta Behr-
ui redseja to Ugguni nokrihtam /
un ta KUNGA Gohdtbu pahr
to Namimu/ tad tee lohzijahs ar
fatweem Waigeem pee Semmes
us to Grthdi/ un peeluhdse un
teize to KUNGU/ ka wiſſch labs/
ka winna Schehlastiba paleek
muhſchigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Untas Kehniisch un wiſſi
Laudis uppureja Uppneus
preekſch ta KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniisch Salama-
nans uppureja Wehrſchus par
Uppureem diwidesinitis un dwi
tuhkſtoſchus/ ir ſints un dwi-
definitis tuhkſtokhas Awis/ tad
eeswech-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
